query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(e.nome, 'Sem equipe') AS equipe,
  COUNT(c.id) AS total_contratos,
  SUM(c.valorVenda) AS vgv_total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.name ORDER BY u.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS corretores
FROM contratos c
INNER JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON u.equipeId = e.id
GROUP BY e.id, e.nome
ORDER BY total_contratos DESC;

INNER JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
